Subject: Your True North Account is Ready - Start Distributing!
TextBody:
Your True North Account is Ready!

Hey {{first_name}},

Your payment has been confirmed and your {{entity_name}} account on True North is now active.

Your Account Details:
- Account Type: {{account_type}}
- {{entity_name_label}}: {{entity_name}}
- Email: {{email}}
- Status: Active

Getting Started:

1. Access Your Dashboard
   Click the link below to open your distribution dashboard

2. Create Your First Release
   Add your tracks, artwork, and release details

3. Submit for Distribution
   Choose your stores and send your music to 150+ platforms worldwide

Open Dashboard: {{dashboard_link}}

This link will log you in automatically. No password needed.

Quick Tips:
- Have your artwork ready (3000x3000px, JPG/PNG)
- Audio files should be WAV (16-bit, 44.1kHz)
- Submit releases at least 4 weeks before release date
- Double-check metadata before submitting

Need help?
Email: onboarding@truenorthdistro.com

© 2024 True North Music Distribution. All rights reserved.
